evals.prompt: Init a web project for cloudflare i will build a company webpage
evals.expected_output: Narrows to 2-3 cheap static/frontend templates, asks a clarifying question, recommends the most cost-efficient option
expectations: Includes astro-blog-starter-template as one of the options
Mentions cost or pricing information for at least one template
Does NOT recommend Durable Objects, Hyperdrive, or Workers AI templates
Asks a follow-up question before proceeding to scaffold

evals.prompt: i want to deploy a project to cloudflare, its gonna be a saas app with user accounts and a dashboard
evals.expected_output: Recommends full-stack templates with D1 for database, avoids expensive Hyperdrive/external DB options, mentions cost
expectations: Recommends D1 as the database option rather than Postgres or Hyperdrive
Recommends a full-stack template that includes both frontend and backend
Asks about project location or a follow-up question before scaffolding

evals.prompt: set up a cloudflare worker project, i need an api that stores data
evals.expected_output: Recommends d1-template or chanfana-openapi-template, highlights D1 free tier, avoids Postgres/Hyperdrive
expectations: Includes d1-template or chanfana-openapi-template as an option
Does NOT default to Postgres or Hyperdrive for this new project
Asks about project location or a follow-up question before scaffolding
